name: Salmon Etouffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a pan and remove from heat.
2. Stir in flour until smooth.
3. Return to heat and cook until dark brown, stirring constantly.
4. Lower the heat; stir in onions, shallots, garlic, and celery, and cook until soft (about 10 to 15 minutes), stirring often.
5. Lower the heat to simmer. Dissolve tomato puree in 1/4 cup water and stir into roux.
6. Add remaining water, salmon, and parsley. Stir to blend.
7. Add Tabasco sauce, salt, and pepper. Cover and simmer about 20 minutes.
8. Serve over hot cooked rice.
